## edu-cli exam-node create

Create an exam node for a syllabus (为考纲创建考试节点)

```
edu-cli exam-node create [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --description string   Description
  -h, --help                 help for create
      --name string          Exam node name (required)
      --sort-order int       Sort order
      --syllabus-id uint     Syllabus ID (required)
```
